series_metadata.series_description: Drug Test Notification Form submitted to testing facilities when a drug test is required for hire, reasonable suspicion, promotion, or job change.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for one year after the test date, in the event of a positive test result keep all forms until completion of testing program is complete (2 years). If scanned, verify image and securely destroy. ; Electronic: Keep for one year after the test date, in the event of a positive test result keep all forms until completion of testing program is complete (2 years)., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
